creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: dougb->freebsd-ports-bugs


I don't have time to deal with this, but the correct solution 
(as I've said many times over the years) is to split the 1 big 
rc.d script into 3 different scripts, one for each service; and 
to supply a "samba" rc.d script that runs nmbd and smbd to handle 
backwards compatibility for samba_enable=1 

If anyone else wants to work on this and needs help, please 
send requests for review to freebsd-rc@FreeBSD.org.
